code:
import io
import string

fn to_upper_byte(_ b: Int) -> Int
  if b >= 97 and b <= 122
    b - 32
  else
    b
  end
end

fn byte_is_ws(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn append_byte(_ acc: String, _ b: Int) -> String
  "#{acc}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut result = ""
    mut i = 0
    mut first_word = true
    while i < n
      while i < n and byte_is_ws(line, i)
        i = i + 1
      end
      if i < n
        if not first_word
          result = "#{result} "
        end
        first_word = false
        match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(b)
          result = append_byte(result, to_upper_byte(b))
        when None
          ()
        end
        i = i + 1
        while i < n and not byte_is_ws(line, i)
          match string.byte_at(line, i)
          when Some(b)
            result = append_byte(result, b)
          when None
            ()
          end
          i = i + 1
        end
      end
    end
    println(result)
  when None
    ()
  end
end
